items.title: Prerequisite: vector spaces
items.description: Norms are defined on vector spaces; you need vectors, addition and scalar multiplication before measuring length or distance.

items.title: Dot products in matrix multiplication
items.description: Each matrix product entry is a dot product, which is an inner product that induces the L2 norm on rows and columns.

items.title: Distance metrics in k-NN
items.description: Algorithm-specific distance choices (Euclidean, Manhattan, Minkowski) extend the basic norms introduced here.

items.title: Feature scaling before distance-based models
items.description: Unscaled features distort distances; preprocessing rescales coordinates so norms reflect meaningful similarity.
